title: Add 2-digit numbers by making tens
description: Practice adding two-digit numbers by making groups of ten.
topic_path: Strategies for adding and subtracting within 100

assessment_items.question_content:
**Complete to solve $75 + 5$.**

$\maroonD{75}+\blueE5$ | 
- | - 
$=(\maroonD{70}~+$ [[☃ numeric-input 1]]$)+ \blueE5$|
$=\maroonD{70} + (~$ [[☃ numeric-input 2]]$+ \blueE5)$ | 
$=\maroonD{70} ~+ $ [[☃ numeric-input 3]]| 
$=$ [[☃ numeric-input 4]] |
hints:
Now, lets add $\maroonD5+ \blueE5$.

$\begin{align}
&\maroonD{75}+\blueE{5}\\\\
=&(\maroonD{70} + \maroonD{5})+\blueE{5}\\\\
=&\maroonD{70}+ (\maroonD5+\blueE{5)}\\\\
=&\maroonD{70}+\purpleD{10}
\end{align}$

Last, let's add $\maroonD{70} + \purpleE{10}$.

$\begin{align}
&\maroonD{75}+\blueE{5}\\\\
=&(\maroonD{70} + \maroonD{5})+\blueE{5}\\\\
=&\maroonD{70}+ (\maroonD5+\blueE{5)}\\\\
=&\maroonD{70}+\purpleD{10}\\\\
=&\goldE{80}
\end{align}$

Here is completed set of equations:

$\begin{align}
&\maroonD{75}+\blueE{5}\\\\
=&(\maroonD{70} + \maroonD{5})+\blueE{5}\\\\
=&\maroonD{70}+ (\maroonD5+\blueE{5)}\\\\
=&\maroonD{70}+\purpleD{10}\\\\
=&\goldE{80}
\end{align}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Complete to solve $63 + 7$.**

$=\maroonD{60}~ + $ [[☃ input-number 7]] |

$\begin{align}
&\maroonD{63}+\blueE{7}\\\\
=&(\maroonD{60} + \maroonD{3})+\blueE{7}\\\\
=&\maroonD{60}+ (\maroonD3+\blueE{7})

$\begin{align}

=&(\maroonD{60} + \maroonD{3})+\blueE{7}\\\\

=&\maroonD{60}+\purpleD{10}\\\\

Here is completed set of equations:

$\begin{align}

=&\maroonD{60}+ (\maroonD3+\blueE{7})\\\\

assessment_items.question_content:
**Complete to solve $3 + 37$.**

$\maroonD{3}+\blueE{37}$ | 
- | - 
$=\maroonD{3}~+($ [[☃ numeric-input 5]] $+~ \blueE{30})$|
$=(\maroonD{3} ~+~$ [[☃ numeric-input 6]] $ )+~\blueE{30}$ | 
$=$ [[☃ numeric-input 7]] $ +~\blueE{30}$| 
$=$ [[☃ numeric-input 8]] |
hints:
We can break apart the number $\blueE{37}$ by place value.

$\begin{align}
&\maroonD{3}+\blueE{37}\\\\
=&\maroonD3 + (\blueE{7} + \blueE{30})
\end{align}$

Now, lets add $\maroonD3 + \blueE7$.

$\begin{align}
&\maroonD{3}+\blueE{37}\\\\
=&\maroonD3 + (\blueE{7} + \blueE{30})\\\\
=&(\maroonD{3}+ \blueE7)+\blueE{30}\\\\
=&\purpleD{10} + \blueE{30}
\end{align}$

Last, let's add $\purpleE{10} + \blueE{30}$.

$\begin{align}
&\maroonD{3}+\blueE{37}\\\\
=&\maroonD3 + (\blueE{7} + \blueE{30})\\\\
=&(\maroonD{3}+ \blueE7)+\blueE{30}\\\\
=&\purpleD{10} + \blueE{30}\\\\
=&\goldE{40}
\end{align}$

Here is completed set of equations:

$\begin{align}
&\maroonD{3}+\blueE{37}\\\\
=&\maroonD3 + (\blueE{7} + \blueE{30})\\\\
=&(\maroonD{3}+ \blueE7)+\blueE{30}\\\\
=&\purpleD{10} + \blueE{30}\\\\
=&\goldE{40}
\end{align}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Complete to solve $29 +51$.**

$\maroonD{29}+\blueE{51}$ |

$=$ [[☃ numeric-input 8]] |
hints:
We can break apart the number $\blueE{51}$ by place value.

$\begin{align}
&\maroonD{29}+\blueE{51}\\\\
=&\maroonD{29} + (\blueE{1}+\blueE{50})
\end{align}$

Now, lets add $\maroonD{29} + \blueE{1}$.

$\begin{align}
&\maroonD{29}+\blueE{51}\\\\
=&\maroonD{29} + (\blueE{1}+\blueE{50})\\\\
=&(\maroonD{29}+ \blueE1) +\blueE{50}\\\\
=&\purpleD{30} + \blueE{50}
\end{align}$

Last, let's add $ \purpleE{30} + \blueE{50}$.

$\begin{align}
&\maroonD{29}+\blueE{51}\\\\
=&\maroonD{29} + (\blueE{1}+\blueE{50})\\\\
=&(\maroonD{29}+ \blueE1) +\blueE{50}\\\\
=&\purpleD{30} + \blueE{50}\\\\
=&\goldE{80}
\end{align}$

Here is completed set of equations:

$\begin{align}
&\maroonD{29}+\blueE{51}\\\\

=&(\maroonD{29}+ \blueE1) +\blueE{50}\\\\
=&\purpleD{30} + \blueE{50}\\\\
